criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: The range of tasks the app can assist with, such as writing, coding, brainstorming, and summarization.

criteria.name: Task Management
criteria.description: Ability to manage tasks, break them down, and provide tips for completion.

criteria.name: Scheduling and Time Management
criteria.description: Capabilities for scheduling tasks, blocking time for important activities, and optimizing calendars.

criteria.name: Content Creation
criteria.description: Features for generating text, images, and other content types for marketing, social media, and other purposes.

criteria.name: Meeting Assistance
criteria.description: Tools for transcribing meetings, summarizing key points, and automating note-taking.

criteria.name: Research and Information Retrieval
criteria.description: Capabilities for searching the internet, summarizing documents, and providing citations.

criteria.name: Team Collaboration
criteria.description: Features for team communication, project management, and collaborative document editing.

criteria.name: Automation
criteria.description: Ability to automate repetitive tasks, connect to other apps, and create custom chatbots.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, intuitive interface, and overall user satisfaction.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: Seamless integration with other productivity tools and platforms.
